corridors.name: Fraser Rise - Plumpton (Western Melbourne)
corridors.key_developments: Multiple housing estates under rapid development. Fraser Rise gazetted 2017, population grew from 0 to 9,097 (2021) to ~21,000 (2024). Wiyal Primary School opened 2026. Springside West Secondary College operating.
corridors.new_infrastructure: New primary school (Wiyal) opened 2026. Bus services confirmed in 2025/26 budget. No major shopping centre announced yet - potential gap.
corridors.opportunity_notes: EXTREMELY HIGH GROWTH. Only 2 pharmacies (Thornhill Park + Aintree) serving 20,000+ people. Ratio ~10,000:1. New shopping centre needed urgently.

corridors.name: Taylor - Throsby (Gungahlin, Canberra)
corridors.key_developments: FASTEST growing area in ALL of Australia (28.7%). Taylor grew from ~3,700 to 4,766 (29%). Largest natural increase in ACT. Largest internal migration gain in ACT.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Taylor Primary School. New community centre. Shopping planned.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Fastest growth rate in Australia but very small base. Check Gungahlin pharmacy coverage. ACT has different pharmacy regulations.

corridors.name: Box Hill - Nelson (North West Sydney)

pharmacies.name: Priceline Pharmacy Gables
pharmacies.address: P20 Stockland Gables Shopping Centre, 2 Lakefront Cr, Gables, NSW, 2765

corridors.key_developments: Third-fastest growing area in Australia. Box Hill-Nelson SA2 grew by 4,042 people (22%) in 2023-24. Part of Hills Shire growth area.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Box Hill town centre under development. North West Metro extension nearby. New schools opening.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Massive growth but only ~2 pharmacies in Box Hill itself. Very high priority.

corridors.name: Mickleham - Kalkallo - Beveridge (Northern Melbourne)

pharmacies.name: Chemist Warehouse Merrifield City SC Mickleham
pharmacies.address: Shop MM02 Merrifield City Shopping Centre 250 to 270 Donnybrook Road, Mickleham, VIC, 3064

pharmacies.name: Chemist Warehouse Kalkallo
pharmacies.address: Shop 20, Kallo Town Centre, Kalkallo, VIC, 3064

corridors.key_developments: Mickleham grew from 3,142 (2016) to 17,452 (2021) to ~30,000 (2024) - forecasted 30,091 by 2026. Beveridge InterCity planned as major new town centre. Merrifield City SC opened. Kallo Town Centre opened.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Merrifield City Shopping Centre (with CW pharmacy). Kallo Town Centre (with CW pharmacy). Beveridge InterCity town centre planned (NO pharmacy yet). Multiple schools open/planned.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Only 4 pharmacies for ~52,000 people = 13,000:1 ratio. Beveridge and Wallan expansion areas still underserved. Beveridge InterCity town centre = prime target.

corridors.name: Tarneit North (Western Melbourne)
corridors.key_developments: Tarneit North SA2 grew 20.3% in 2023-24. Part of Wyndham LGA, one of Australias fastest growing municipalities.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Multiple planned community centres. Train station at Tarneit. New school sites.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Very high growth rate. Northern Tarneit especially underserved.

corridors.name: Rockbank - Mount Cottrell (Western Melbourne)

pharmacies.name: TerryWhite Chemmart Woodlea
pharmacies.address: Shop T14, 2 Lim Way, Aintree, VIC, 3336

corridors.key_developments: Massive greenfield development west of Melbourne. Rockbank railway station upgraded 2019. Multiple estates under construction. Mount Atkinson PSP (Precinct Structure Plan) approved.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Rockbank station upgraded. Mount Atkinson town centre planned. Multiple school sites designated.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Second-fastest growth in Melbourne (4,100 new people in one year). Adjacent to Fraser Rise corridor.

pharmacies.name: TerryWhite Chemmart
pharmacies.address: Schofields, NSW

corridors.new_infrastructure: Marsden Park town centre expanding. Elara Village shopping. Multiple schools.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Only 2 pharmacies for 27,000+ people = ~13,500:1 ratio. CRITICAL GAP.

corridors.key_developments: Australias LARGEST planned community. Ripley grew 15% in 2023-24 (2,700 people). Ripley Town Centre opened 2018 (9,000sqm). Ecco Ripley masterplan for 120,000 people.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Ripley Town Centre with medical centre and supermarket. Ripley Central State School opened 2023. More town centres planned for South Ripley.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Only 1 pharmacy (Ripley Chempro) for ~22,000 people = 22,000:1 ratio! Building to 120,000. EXTREME OPPORTUNITY. South Ripley town centre needs pharmacy.

corridors.new_infrastructure: Officer town centre expanding. Selandra Rise community hub. Multiple schools.
corridors.opportunity_notes: 6 pharmacies for ~45,000+ across corridor. Better than north/west but southern Clyde still has gaps.

corridors.new_infrastructure: Yarrabilba Town Centre shopping. St Clares Catholic School (2017). Yarrabilba State School (2018). Secondary College (2020). San Damiano College (2021).
corridors.opportunity_notes: Only 1 pharmacy (TWC Yarrabilba) for ~16,000 people = 16,000:1 ratio. Building to 50,000. CRITICAL.

corridors.new_infrastructure: Molonglo commercial centre planned. New schools. Group Centre planned.
corridors.opportunity_notes: Fast growth. Check pharmacy presence. Molonglo Group Centre = pharmacy target.

corridors.name: Legana (West Tamar, Launceston)
corridors.key_developments: Growing residential area 12km north of Launceston. New primary school opened 2024 (350 students). Community sports precinct built. West Tamar Highway being upgraded to 2 lanes each direction by end 2026.
corridors.new_infrastructure: Legana Marketplace (anchored by Woolworths). New primary school (2024). Community sports precinct. Highway upgrade.
corridors.opportunity_notes: ZERO pharmacies in Legana! Nearest pharmacy is ~12km away at Riverside/Windsor. Wikipedia mentions a "chemist" at Legana Marketplace but NO pharmacy in our database. Population ~6,000 and growing. New school = young families = pharmacy demand. MJs BACKYARD. If the chemist mention is outdated/closed, this is a TOP PRIORITY MONOPOLY POSITION.
